data.title: Centrifuge Expands Tokenized RWAs to Solana, Starting With $400M Treasury Fund
data.description:
• Centrifuge is expanding its tokenized asset services to the Solana blockchain, starting with Anemoy's $400 million tokenized U.S. Treasury fund.
  • The deJTRSY token will allow Solana users to earn yield from short-term Treasuries on platforms like Raydium, Kamino and Lulo.
  • This week, Solana Foundation partnered with bank-focused blockchain tech firm R3 to bring real-world assets to Solana, while Securitize-issued tokenized fund of Apollo credit assets is also being introduced to Solana-based DeFi protocols.

data.title: Major TradFi Institutions to Pursue Tokenization Efforts on Solana
data.description:
• R3, a U.K. developer of blockchain technology for financial institutions, is teaming up with the Solana Foundation to bring the former's clients and their tokenized real-world assets to Solana.
  • R3 holds over $10 billion in assets and counts the likes of HSBC, Bank of America, Bank of Italy and the Monetary Authority of Singapore among its participants.
  • R3's aim is to supercharge the scale and liquidity of the tokenized asset ecosystem by making the assets available on a public blockchain.

data.title: Justin Sun-Linked Wallet Leading Access to Trump Dinner Tagged as Belonging to HTX
data.description:
• The top wallet on the leaderboard for President Trump's dinner with the largest holders of his memecoin may belong to crypto exchange HTX, according to blockchain explorers.
  • Sun has said he is the top holder of TRUMP tokens, and the wallet is tagged with "Sun" on the leaderboard.
  • HTX has in the past said it's under the leadership of Justin Sun, a member of its global advisory board.

data.title: Kraken To List Tokenized Version of Nvidia, Apple, Tesla Shares
data.description:
• Kraken will offer 24/7 global trading of tokenized shares in over 50 U.S. stocks and ETFs, including Nvidia, Tesla, and SPY.
  • The xStocks tokens, issued on the Solana blockchain, represent real shares held by Backed Finance and can be redeemed 1:1 for cash.
  • This expansion positions Kraken as the first exchange to successfully launch tokenized U.S. equities after Binance's failed 2021 attempt.

data.title: First U.S. XRP Futures ETF Begins Trading on Nasdaq
data.description:
• Volatility Shares launched the first non-leveraged U.S.-listed ETF tracking XRP futures, trading under the ticker XRPI on Nasdaq.
  • The ETF carries a net expense ratio of 0.94% and invests primarily in XRP futures and XRP-linked exchange-traded products.
  • A second product, a leveraged 2x XRP futures ETF, is also in the works as interest in XRP-based funds grows.

data.title: Global Dollar USDG Eyes Hundreds of Partners Attracted by Yield, Sees 'Big Names' From TradFi
data.description:
• USDG says it's a truly decentralized consortium with no cap on the number of members who can join.
  • Members work to popularize the token and receive a share of the interest earned on the reserves that back it.
  • Kraken has been using USDG to move money around the world, as well as offering its clients the chance to earn 4.1% yield on the dollar.

data.title: Trump-Backed World Liberty Buys BUILDon Token, Sending Prices Up 1,340%
data.description:
• World Liberty Financial announced the purchase of BUILDon on Wednesday, sparking a 1,340% move to the upside.
  • Daily trading volume rose from below $100 million to $1.2 billion over the past 24 hours.
  • The project now holds 636,000 BUILDon (B) tokens valued at $172,000.

data.title: Bitcoin Project Roxom Global Raises $17.9M to Build BTC Treasury, Create Media Network
data.description:
• Bitcoin project Roxom Global is building a BTC-denominated securities exchange and a 24/7 media network dedicated entirely to bitcoin.
  • The project has raised a total of $17.9 million across the two ventures.
  • The company has plans to add a purchase a further 30 BTC in the coming weeks, which would give it a bitcoin treasury worth over $12.5 million based on the current price of over $100,700.

data.title: U.S. Stablecoin Bill Approval Could Trigger a Long-Term Crypto Bull Market: Bitwise
data.description:
• Passage of stablecoin legislation in the U.S. could lead to a long-term crypto bull market, the report said.
  • Bitwise said this could be one of the most important regulatory developments in the history of crypto.
  • The biggest beneficiaries could be ether, solana, uniswap and aave, the asset manager said.

data.title: Strategy Plans $2.1B Sale of Its Perpetual Strife Preferred Stock
data.description:
• Shares to be sold over time via “at the market” offerings under SEC Rule 415(a)(4), with flexibility for negotiated or block trades.
  • Net proceeds will be allocated to general corporate purposes, including potential bitcoin purchases and operational funding.
